reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible, quise calibrar mis cubiertas y me cobraron $400 una ficha por 1.05 minutos por goma. Sistema poco eficiente, poco practico e inutil. Apenas llegue a calibrar las 4 ruedas.Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas, wanted to check my tire pressure, and they charged me $400 for a token for 1.05 minutes per tire. The system is inefficient, impractical, and useless. I barely managed to check all four tires. A disaster.
